description: CompositionGreen striped kurta made of Tussar silk/ cotton fabric, has a mandarin collar, a half buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest, long sleeves and a vented hemFitRegularWash careDry clean onlyfabindia specialises in natural, craft-based contemporary pieces, while also providing rural craft persons a platform to use traditional dyeing and fabric printing techniques. Capturing the essence of Indian roots, crafted with a focus on the traditional, this kurta sets the tone for an all-new ethnic trend. Wear this with denims or cotton pants.Model statisticsThe product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
